scripts.build: npm run build:css:all && npm run build:js:obfuscate
scripts.build:js:obfuscate: npm run build:js && javascript-obfuscator static/js/main.min.js --output static/js/main.min.js --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --dead-code-injection true --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 && javascript-obfuscator static/js/modules/index-enhancements.min.js --output static/js/modules/index-enhancements.min.js --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --dead-code-injection true --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 && javascript-obfuscator static/js/modules/theme-preload.min.js --output static/js/modules/theme-preload.min.js --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --dead-code-injection true --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 && javascript-obfuscator static/js/pages/knowledge.min.js --output static/js/pages/knowledge.min.js --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --dead-code-injection true --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 && javascript-obfuscator static/js/schema/index.min.js --output static/js/schema/index.min.js --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --dead-code-injection true --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 && javascript-obfuscator static/js/schema/knowledge.min.js --output static/js/schema/knowledge.min.js --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --dead-code-injection true --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 && javascript-obfuscator static/js/schema/privacy.min.js --output static/js/schema/privacy.min.js --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --dead-code-injection true --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 && javascript-obfuscator static/js/schema/cookies.min.js --output static/js/schema/cookies.min.js --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --dead-code-injection true --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64
scripts.optimize: npm run build:css:all && npm run build:js:obfuscate
scripts.build:css:all: npm run build:css:cookies && npm run build:css:index && npm run build:css:knowledge && npm run build:css:privacy && npm run build:css:risk && npm run build:css:terms
